task: v0.4.21 hotfix — AgentEvent forwarding + workflow cleanup
summary: v0.4.21 hotfix — AgentEvent forwarding + workflow cleanup
reason:
Chairman directive (2026-07-01 22:50): '我需要前后端都可以完成任务，Win系统是方便即装即用，网站是方便移植到Linux跟mac，所以需要你修复问题，给之前的任务清理一下，别让它跑，然后继续修'.

Three changes in this commit:

A) Cleared 4 stuck workflows in chairman's data_dir
   (~\AppData\Roaming\flowntier\storage.sqlite):
     - 01KW9SCMKG7WAJ9J03JG7Z8JCD (old '234324' test, REQ_RECEIVED)
     - 01KWCF0BH9VKNKNTFEQC8BTVQY (old 'auth_login' test, REQ_RECEIVED)
     - 01KWF14456N06W4HXF112XPKCT (taro #1, REQ_RECEIVED)
     - 01KWF2PR71PC126WF26A71TYZY (taro #2, REQ_RECEIVED)
   All set state='FAILED', phase='aborted', with workflow_log
   entry crediting 'cleanup_stuck_workflows'. The tasks table had
   0 rows for these workflows — chief never even spawned the
   planner phase. Pure SQL cleanup; chairman's settings,
   role_overrides, provider rows, and secrets untouched.

B) Found and fixed the root cause of chairman's '跳出'
   (event 000060):

   apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/lib.rs events_bridge() was
   forwarding only WfEvent payloads to the webview:

     if let Some(ev) = v.get('event') {           // WfEvent shape
         app.emit('wf:event', ev.clone())
     }

   But agent_core's broadcast::Sender<AgentEvent> is a
   SEPARATE channel — its events serialise to
   {kind:'done', wf_id, status, summary} or
   {kind:'text_delta', agent_id, delta} etc. None of these
   have an .event field, so every AgentEvent was silently
   dropped on the floor. Chief ran the task to completion
   (status=DONE, summary returned via run_task HTTP) but
   the webview's useAgentStream hook never received any
   text_delta / done events. ChatZone transcript stayed
   empty; chairman saw a 'stuck' spinner (workflow stuck in
   REQ_RECEIVED for several minutes).

   Fix: forward every parsed line as-is on the wf:event
   channel. Frontend useAgentStream filters by .kind field
   (AGENT_KINDS = {text_delta, tool_started, tool_finished,
   phase_transition, token_usage, done}). WfEvent payloads
   lack .kind and get filtered at JS layer. Two event types
   now coexist on one channel.

C) tauri-shim.js fanoutEvent rewrite: dispatch by eventName
   'wf:event' (matches Tauri shell channel name) instead of
   filtering by payload.kind. Now HTML frontend receives
   every AgentEvent the same way the Tauri shell does.

   Verified: SSE stream from v0.4.21 bridge shows full
   text_delta chunks + done event after a chief
   run_task. Browser tab subscribed via the SSE channel
   receives them through the shim's transformCallback
   wrapper.

D) Shipped to chairman:
   - C:\Users\thatg\Desktop\Flowntier_0.4.21_x64-setup.exe
     (8,469,588 bytes, full NSIS installer, includes the
     patched Tauri shell)
   - C:\Users\thatg\Desktop\flowntier-runtime-v0.4.21.exe
     (8,540,672 bytes, standalone runtime for manual
     launch)

E) force-add apps/html-frontend/dist/{index.html,
   tauri-shim.js} so chairman's git pull picks up the
   fixed shim. (dist/ is in .gitignore, but the html-
   frontend bundle needs to be in git for chairman to
   access it via the repo path.)

Honest risk:
- 'wf:event' channel now carries two event types without a
  wire-level discriminator. If a future WfEvent grows a .kind
  field it would be misrouted. Mitigation: future cleanup
  should add a discriminator tag.
- The cleared workflows were stuck in REQ_RECEIVED because
  chief's run_task returns summary= in Chinese — the
  chairman may want to inspect why chief never progressed.
  Likely cause: chief returned a clarifying question
  (web/桌面/CLI) that the now-fixed UI will surface. v0.4.22
  follow-up: add a 'restart from REQ_RECEIVED' button in
  the Settings panel for the chairman to retry without
  losing the original user_request.
- NSIS install will overwrite chairman's existing runtime
  + desktop binary. ~/AppData/Roaming/flowntier/ is preserved
  across the install (so prior settings, secrets, workflow
  history carry over).

Honest risk to chairman's workflow cleanup:
- The 4 FAILED workflows remain in the workflows table
  (state='FAILED' now, not deleted). Chairman will see them
  as 'aborted' in the workflow history panel. v0.4.22 will
  add a 'delete failed workflow' button.
